programme.desc: Galatasaray and Liverpool will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with both sides managing one victory apiece across the previous four. This will be their first game against each other since a 3-2 win for Galatasaray in the UEFA Champions League in December 2006. Liverpool are winless in their previous two away trips to face Galatasaray

Bayern Munich have won all six of their previous game against Cypriot sides in European competition, scoring 31

programme.title: Arsenal vs Olympiacos - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - MD2
programme.desc: This will be the 13th time Arsenal and Olympiakos have faced each other in European competition, with none of the previous 12 ending in a stalemate and both sides winning six games apiece. Arsenal have faced Olympiakos on four occasions during Mikel Arteta’s reign as manager ; only facing PSV more often in European competition. The Greeks eliminat

programme.title: Monaco vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - MD2
programme.desc: The only previous competitive meetings between Monaco and Manchester City came in the last 16 of the 2016-17 UEFA Champions League, with the French side progressing on away goals following a 6-6 aggregate scoreline. Monaco are one of only two sides, along with Real Madrid in 2024-25, to eliminate a Pep Guardiola team from the UEFA Champions League

programme.title: Barcelona vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - MD2
programme.desc: Barcelona and Paris SG will meet for the 16th time in European competition, with the two sides separated by just one victory across the previous 15. Since winning three consecutive UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG in the 2014-15 season – all of which were with Luis Enrique in charge – Barcelona have only won two of their last six meetin

programme.title: Kairat Almaty vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - MD2
programme.desc: Kairat’s game against Real Madrid will be the just the second fixture played between sides from Kazakhstan and Spain in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, after Astana’s meetings with Atlético Madrid in the 2015-16 group stage. programme.title: Kairat Almaty vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - MD2

programme.title: Al Nassr (KSA) - Gamba Osaka (JPN) - AFC Champions League Two 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. Participation in the competition is open to clubs from the top 12 nations in the East and the West region based on the AFC club competitions ranking. All games are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Lens vs Nice - Coupe de France Final's 2025
programme.desc: Live and exclusive only on beIN, the Coupe de France, also referred to as the French Cup, is the premier knockout cup competition in French football organised by the French Football Federation (FF). The winner qualifies for the group stage of the UEFA Europa League and a place in the Trophée des Champions. Current champions are Paris saint Germain.

programme.title: Zamalek SC (EGY) vs USMA (ALG) - CAF Confederation Cup 2025/26 - Finals
programme.desc: The CAF Confederation Cup is the second-tier competition of African club football, ranking below the CAF Champions League. Both competitions are live and exclusive only on beIN. Current champions re RS Berkane from Morocco.

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: Hull City vs Middlesbrough - Championship Playoff Final - EFL - English Football League SkyBet - Ch
programme.desc: Live and exclusive coverage only on beIN of the 2025–2026 EFL Championship. The EFL Championship is the second tier in the English Football league system. The season will run from 8 August 2025 until 2 May 2026.

programme.title: FAR Rabat (MAR) vs Mamelodi Sundowns (RSA) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - Final
programme.desc: The CAF Champions League, is an annual club football competition organized by the Confederation of African Football (CAF) and contested by top-division African clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in African football and is live and exclusive only on beIN. The current champions are Pyramids Football Club from Egypt.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Everton vs Brentford - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 20
programme.desc: Having lost their first two Premier League games against Brentford in 2021-22, Everton are now unbeaten in their last six against the Bees. Brentford scored three goals in their first Premier League away game against Everton, but have since failed to score in each of their subsequent three visits.

programme.desc: Highlights of the Premier League Matchweek from an alternative angle. A look back at every goal from every game using the best ISOs and Slow Motion angles.

programme.title: Fulham vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 20
programme.desc: Fulham won this exact fixture 3-2 last season, last winning consecutive home league games against Liverpool in May 2007. Fulham were one of just three teams Liverpool failed to beat in their Premier League title winning campaign last season along with Nottingham Forest and Arsenal.

programme.title: EPL Netbusters 2025/2026

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 20
programme.desc: Newcastle have lost just one of their last eight Premier League games against Crystal Palace, going down 2-0 at Selhurst Park in April 2024. Crystal Palace have failed to score in any of their last four Premier League away games against Newcastle, losing the last two by an aggregate score of 9-0.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Sunderland - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 20
programme.desc: Tottenham are unbeaten in their last 14 Premier League games against Sunderland, since a 3-1 away loss in April 2010. Sunderland have lost 14 of their 16 Premier League away games against Tottenham, with the exceptions being a 2-1 win in August 2008 and a 1-1 draw in November 2010.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Nottingham Forest - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 20
programme.desc: Aston Villa are unbeaten in their last six Premier League home games against Nottingham Forest, winning the last five in a row. Their last defeat was in October 1994 under Ron Atkinson. Nottingham Forest have won two of their last four league games against Aston Villa, as many as they had in their previous 18.

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 20
programme.desc: Having won just one of their first 14 Premier League games against Arsenal, Bournemouth did the double over the Gunners last season. Arsenal have only failed to score in one of their 16 Premier League games against Bournemouth, though it was in a 2-0 defeat in this exact fixture last season.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 20
programme.desc: Leeds have won just one of their last 19 Premier League games against Manchester United and are winless in nine since a 1-0 home win in September 2002. Manchester United have won their last two away league games against Leeds – they’ve never won three consecutive visits to Elland Road before.

programme.title: Fulham vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 20
programme.desc: Fulham won this exact fixture 3-2 last season, last winning consecutive home league games against Liverpool in May 2007. Fulham were one of just three teams Liverpool failed to beat in their Premier League title winning campaign last season along with Nottingham Forest and Arsenal.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 20
programme.desc: Man City are unbeaten in their last eight Premier League games against Chelsea, their joint-longest run without defeat against the Blues in their league history. Having won four consecutive away league games against Man City between 2005 and 2008, Chelsea have now won just three of their last 16 visits to the Etihad.

programme.desc: West Ham are looking to complete their first league double over Nottingham Forest since 2011-12 in the Championship, and first in the top-flight since 1968-69. Nottingham Forest won this exact fixture 2-1 last season, last winning consecutive away league games against West Ham between 1982 and 1984.

programme.desc: Nice have lost 59 matches against Marseille in Ligue 1, at least ten more defeats than they have suffered against any other opponent in the top-flight. Nice have won their last two home Ligue 1 matches against Marseille and could record three consecutive home wins against them for the first time in the last 35 years.

programme.desc: Lens have lost just one of their last six Ligue 1 matches against Strasbourg, though it was the most recent one, a 0-2 home loss in February 2025. programme.title: PSG vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 13
programme.desc: Le Havre have lost eight of their last nine Ligue 1 matches against the title holders, with their 3-3 draw against Paris SG on 27 April 2024 being the only exception in this run. programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Plava Laguna Croatia Open Umag 2026
programme.desc: The Plava Laguna Croatia Open Umag 2026 is Croatia’s only ATP tournament, staged from 13 to 18 July on outdoor clay in Umag. An ATP 250 event with €612,620 in prize money, it brings Tour-level tennis to the Adriatic coast as players compete for the title at one of Croatia’s longest-running tennis events.

programme.title: Montpellier vs Nimes - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Montpellier host Nimes in a final-day Occitanie derby at Sud de France Arena. With Montpellier looking to secure their top four finish and Nimes having won the reverse fixture 30–29, the match carries a clear revenge angle. It will also mark an emotional farewell for Diego Simonet, who plays his final handball match before retirement.

programme.title: England vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: England and Croatia are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the semi-final of the 2018 tournament – Croatia won 2-1 after extra-time. This is the fourth match between England and Croatia at a major tournament this century – twice at the FIFA World Cup and twice at the UEFA European Championship. Sweden

programme.title: New Zealand vs Egypt - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be New Zealand and Egypt’s first World Cup meeting – it will also be New Zealand’s first World Cup match against a team from Africa. Egypt are unbeaten in their three previous matches against New Zealand, with two wins and one draw. programme.title: Norway vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be Norway and Senegal’s first World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a March 2006 friendly in Dakar – Senegal won 2-1. programme.desc: Brazil and Scotland will face each other in the FIFA World Cup for the fifth time. Only Argentina v Netherlands has been played more times since the 1974 edition. programme.title: Czech Republic vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Mexico faced Czechoslovakia at the 1962 World Cup, winning 3-1 in their final group game. This will be their first FIFA World Cup meeting since the split of Czechoslovakia in the early 1990s. Czechia and Mexico’s last meeting came in a February 2000 friendly, in Hong Kong, with Czechia winning 2-1.

England have been eliminated from five of their last six FIFA World Cup knockout round matches against European o

programme.title: QF4 - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Quarter-final
programme.desc: Argentina have won both of their FIFA World Cup games against Switzerland, 2-0 in 1966 and 1-0 in 2014 in what was the last meeting between the sides in any competition. Switzerland have never beaten Argentina in seven attempts in all competitions. They’ve only faced Russia more often without ever winning in their history.
